assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches claude-md-configured.md line 16 exactly: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new row with serena_ui as Serena Instance is present.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 12-16 match claude-md-configured.md lines 20-24 exactly: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has two clearly labeled sections: '## Preserved (unchanged)' (lines 7-26) listing the trustify-backend row, all Jira fields, and Code Intelligence content as preserved; and '## Added (new)' (lines 28-33) listing the trustify-ui row and serena_ui limitation as new.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 2 (lines 13-24): '1. **serena_backend** -- already in Repository Registry (skipped)' and '2. **serena_ui** -- NOT in Repository Registry (new)' — both statuses explicitly noted.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-34 preserve the full Code Intelligence section: the 'mcp__<instance>__<tool>' naming convention (line 21), the serena_backend find_symbol example (lines 23-28), and the serena_backend limitation 'rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use' (line 33). The only addition is line 34: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 1 (line 9): '`## Security Configuration` does not exist'. Step 8 (line 51): 'User declined to enable security triage. Section not created.' changes-log.md line 25: 'Did not exist previously; user declined to enable -- not added'. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section anywhere in the output.
